TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kanian ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,864 buwan, 4,713 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 517 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 4,196 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 8%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. qalang Kanian ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. qalang Kanian ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Kanian ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Kanian ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Kanian ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Kanian ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kanian hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kanian hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kanian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kanian hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Kanian hya' ga Takubuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kanian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. qalaŋ kanian ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ kanian ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa takuβuwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kanian ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,864 buwan, 4,713 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 517 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 4,196 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 8%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. qalang Kanian ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. qalang Kanian ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Kanian ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Kanian ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Kanian ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Kanian ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kanian hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kanian hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kanian hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kanian hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Kanian hya' ga Takubuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kanian ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu kariŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. qalaŋ kanian ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ kanian ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ kanian ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na kanian ħjaʔ ɣa takuβuwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
